summary: Iteration 3: Fully validated new testimonial variant of /api/share-card and the new 'open-share-reading' frontend button. 10/10 backend tests pass (testimonial EN PNG, FR PNG, EN/FR byte-differ, missing/empty excerpt → 400 for 4 input variants, data-variant default still works, data-variant explicit still works, data vs testimonial byte-differ, 3000+ char excerpt trimmed & renders). 6/6 frontend flow checks pass on mobile viewport (390x844): button hidden before reading, button appears after AI reading, click fires POST /api/share-card with variant='testimonial' + full reading_excerpt (3338 chars), testimonial PNG renders in share-card-modal, reopen uses cached URI (0 duplicate POSTs), data variant unchanged (variant='data', no excerpt, cached on reopen).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py approaching 620 lines — consider splitting /api/share-card renderers (_render_testimonial + inline data render) into a separate module before the next iteration pushes it past 700.
result.tsx: the two cached URIs are stored as separate state vars (cardUri, readingCardUri). Works fine; if more variants are added, consider a { [variant]: uri } map to DRY up.

_pick_excerpt: max_chars=360 is enforced but the font fallback loop in _render_testimonial iterates down to size=34 and still limits lines[:12] — good, no overflow risk observed even with 4800-char input.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 new testimonial tests, previous share-card + health/daily still pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 green. Testimonial PNG ~80-120KB, data PNG ~200-300KB. Backend correctly returns 400 (not 422) when variant='testimonial' but reading_excerpt is missing/empty/whitespace-only (pydantic field_validator strips to None, then endpoint raises HTTPException 400). POST payload from 'open-share-reading' includes the full reading text (~3kB for typical Claude output); backend trims it via _pick_excerpt to 360 chars for the visible pull-quote. Frontend cache: readingCardUri (testimonial) and cardUri (data) are independent; reopening either variant does NOT refetch. Mobile viewport 390x844 used. Lang toggle still works (not re-tested in this iteration as it was green in iter 2).
